Senior Software Engineer

Acme Corp San Francisco, CA 201 applicants

About the role

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our growing team at Acme Corp.

This is a full-time position based in San Francisco, CA. Remote work options are available.

  • 5+ years of experience with React and TypeScript
  • Strong proficiency in Node.js and REST APIs
  • Experience with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
  • Must have excellent communication skills
  • Experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, and MongoDB is required

Requirements

You should have 5+ years of full-time software engineering experience.

We require deep knowledge of JavaScript and TypeScript.

We prefer candidates with experience in GraphQL and microservices.

Salary: $150,000 - $200,000 per year

  • Frontend Engineer Beta Inc New York, NY
  • Backend Engineer Gamma LLC Remote
